string 2:
Hee hee... I'm starting to go places. The tip for this lead
came in through social media!
{next}Tell me all about it.
{next}Who gave you the info?
{next}And... you're sure it's trustworthy?

Really draws you in, doesn't it? I'm telling you, this one's
juicy!

A fellow fan of the occult who just started following me.
We're like birds of a feather.

You can't do this work if you can't spot a fake from a mile
away. I trust my instincts.

I'll cut to the chase. The tip's worth acting on because my
contact's directly involved.

The kid who messaged me is really into programming.
Apparently, they do it for fun.
{next}Kids these days sure are something.
{next}What kind of programming?
{next}Nothing illegal, I hope.

I was surprised, too. Apparently, they got so good, they
even made their own character.

They say they made their own character based on a monster
they saw. Makes you think, huh?

I seriously doubt it. Apparently, all they did was make
their own character.

I saw an image of it, too, and it was really cute! Then one
day, all its data disappeared.

Then they got some weird message telling them to visit the
back alleys of Akihabara.

That's when the kid got scared and reached out to me. Don't
we just have to help them?
{next}Absolutely. Let's help that kid out!
{next}As long as it's worth my while.
{end}Maybe some other time.

I knew you'd say that! I'm sure that kid will appreciate
your help, and so will I!

Okay, okay. If you lend a hand, I'll make sure you get your
reward.

Oh, are you busy? In that case, just let me know when you're
free.
Well? Got the time to do some investigating?
{next}Yeah. Let's go.
{end}No, not yet.
Just what I was hoping to hear!

Oh, okay. Let me know when you've got some time on your
hands.

That message mentioned the back alleys of Akihabara, but
didn't specify where.

I guess we'll just have to wander around and see what we can
find. Keep your eyes peeled.

Huh?! What's this?
Looks like some sort of toy blocks.

Maybe some kid dropped them here by mistake.
But, then again...
Don't touch that!
Aaaaagh! It's a gh-ghooooost!

The public safety office is investigating that object. We're
just low on police tape.

Th-That was terrifying! Brought back bad memories of that
one public safety officer...
What was that?
N-Nothing! I d-didn't say a word. Hahaha...

But... is public safety really concerned about a little
block like this?

That's no ordinary toy block. We've gotten readings off of
it from Dr. Simmons' device.

I don't know who that is, but if they're a doctor, they must
be on to something.

We believe there are others like it, too, since we picked up
similar readings nearby.

What? Really?! And have you investigated any other places
with similar readings?

That's what I'd like to be doing right now, but as you can
see, I can't leave my post.

Then why don't we take a look around for you? These blocks
don't seem that dangerous.

You're civilians. I can't ask you to help, but... I won't
stop you from looking around.

Still, I want you to run at the first sign of danger.
Promise me you'll do that, okay?

There are two places with similar readings nearby. And
remember. Be ready to run.

Bingo! This block is just like the other one. It's gotta be
causing one of the readings.

Hm... I'm not seeing a stream in this, but we can at least
take the block to that officer.
Okay. Let's go find the source of that other reading!
Aha! Here's another one!

This toy block is just like the others. Let's give it to
that public safety officer, too!
Now let's go report back.

What? Weren't you going to investigate for me? I can't leave
my post. Go get searching!
Good. You're back. You didn't do anything reckless, did you?
We found two other toy blocks like the one here.

Y-You brought the blocks here?! That was a risky move!
Though I am curious about them...

Oh! I just remembered! Listen. About that tip we came here
to investigate...

That character whose data disappeared looked like a dinosaur
made of toy blocks!

This might have something to do with that. We should keep
investigating—
Wait... Quick! Get away from those blocks!
Huh? Whoa! The toy blocks are moving!
They're... joining together?
Ngh... Gaaah...
Look! It's a monster!
Now's my chance for the perfect shot! Say cheese!

What? Are you insane?! Get out of here! That thing's going
to attack!

So lonely... I just want... a friend... C'mon... Let's
play... Let's play...!
Let's plaaay! Yaaah!
Oh! The monster disappeared. Where could it have gone to?

That was no monster. It's a strange kind of lifeform we're
trying to hunt down.

They're highly dangerous creatures that can't be allowed to
roam free.

Hey! Could you not jump to conclusions? That was probably a
character designed by a child.
I'm headed back to HQ. This needs to be reported right away.

I appreciate you helping out with this, but it's time you
cleared out, too.

We'll probably get in trouble if we stay here. Let's head
somewhere else for now.

*sigh* That officer just would NOT listen to reason. That
was no trick. I'm sure of it!

Earlier, I left out how the kid who messaged me just changed
schools, and has no friends.

They hardly ever see their parents, either, which is why the
kid turned to programming.
{next}It said it was lonely.
{next}You think that's why the Digimon went crazy?
{next}Then we should be that kid's friends!

Right, I heard that, too. I bet that kid's feelings had a
major impact on that Digimon.

That Digimon said it was lonely. I bet it was influenced by
how that child felt.

That's a great idea! But I want them to be friends with kids
their age, too.

I doubt that Digimon meant to go berserk. It was just lonely
and didn't know what to do.
But we should head back. Oh, and I almost forgot!

Here's your reward for helping out this time. See you
around!
